Apple delivered $94.0B in total net sales for Q3 FY2025, up 10% year over year, with iPhone and Services driving the largest contributions. [FILING] Total gross margin reached $43.7B, and total gross margin percentage improved to 46.5% from 46.3% a year ago. [FILING]
